svg.text: Best Single-Serve Coffee Makers with Grinder (2026)
Ranked by cup quality, brew speed, cleanup effort, and pod flexibility

g.text: • Best Overall: Cuisinart Grind & Brew Single-Serve
• Best Budget: BLACK+DECKER Single Serve Mill & Brew

• Best Minimal Cleanup: Gevi 4-in-1 Grind & Brew
